records.question: Which students have a cell mobile number exactly +60(5)3280072514 and live in the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON addresses.address_id = student_addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.country = 'USA' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514'
records.pred_sql: SELECT students.student_id FROM Students students JOIN Addresses addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id WHERE students.cell_mobile_number = '+60(5)3280072514' AND addresses.country = 'USA'

records.question: Which students, with the first name exactly 'David' and the middle name exactly 'Darlene', have at least one address located in the city exactly 'New Annabellefort', have associated assessment notes, have associated behavior incidents with a date_incident_start less than or equal to '2017-04-23 07:03:17', and have associated student addresses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN assessment_notes ON students.student_id = assessment_notes.student_id
JOIN behavior_incident ON students.student_id = behavior_incident.student_id
JOIN student_addresses ON students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'New Annabellefort' AND behavior_incident.date_incident_start <= '2017-04-23 07:03:17' AND students.middle_name = 'Darlene' AND students.first_name = 'David'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id
FROM Students s
JOIN Addresses a ON s.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN Assessment_Notes an ON s.student_id = an.student_id
JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
JOIN Student_Addresses sa ON s.student_id = sa.student_id
WHERE s.first_name = 'David'
  AND s.middle_name = 'Darlene'
  AND a.city = 'New Annabellefort'
  AND bi.date_incident_start <= '2017-04-23 07:03:17'

records.question: Which students with the middle name Justyn, living at 654 Fisher Roads in the USA, left university on or before 2018-03-18 07:01:27 and have assessment notes dated on or before 2014-04-28 02:07:53, experienced a behavior incident starting on or after 2018-01-31 10:51:13 that ended exactly on 2018-03-18 18:40:05?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN assessment_notes ON students.student_id = assessment_notes.student_id
JOIN behavior_incident ON students.student_id = behavior_incident.student_id
JOIN students_in_detention ON students.student_id = students_in_detention.student_id
WHERE behavior_incident.date_incident_start >= '2018-01-31 10:51:13' AND addresses.country = 'USA' AND behavior_incident.date_incident_end = '2018-03-18 18:40:05' AND addresses.line_1 = '654 Fisher Roads' AND assessment_notes.date_of_notes <= '2014-04-28 02:07:53' AND students.middle_name = 'Justyn' AND students.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 07:01:27'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT students.student_id
FROM Students students
JOIN Addresses addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
LEFT JOIN Assessment_Notes notes ON students.student_id = notes.student_id
LEFT JOIN Behavior_Incident incidents ON students.student_id = incidents.student_id
WHERE students.middle_name = 'Justyn'
  AND addresses.line_1 = '654 Fisher Roads'
  AND addresses.country = 'USA'
  AND students.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 07:01:27'
  AND (notes.date_of_notes IS NULL OR notes.date_of_notes <= '2014-04-28 02:07:53')
  AND incidents.date_incident_start >= '2018-01-31 10:51:13'
  AND incidents.date_incident_end = '2018-03-18 18:40:05'
